nodes.label: CasebookPanel
nodes.description: Cases Bank panel (بنك القضايا) shown as a tab in StudentView. Navigation badge shows 6 cases stored.

nodes.label: CasebookPanel
nodes.description: React component rendering the student cases bank panel (بنك القضايا). Displays saved legal cases in a 2-column card grid with category filters (civil/criminal/commercial), star ratings, court name badges, legal principle previews, and an add-case action. Part of the StudentView tab system.

nodes.label: CasebookPanel
nodes.description: Cases bank panel (بنك القضايا) accessible via tab. Stats card shows 6 total cases in the student's casebook.

properties.description: Cases bank panel (بنك القضايا tab). Tracks 6 legal cases associated with the student's coursework.
